step1.title: Select file and account
step1.drop_zone: Drop your CSV or Excel file here
step1.account_help: Each transaction is linked to a specific account. It's needed to compute per-account balances and to avoid duplicates when re-importing the same statement.
step1.saved_format: Saved format found for {{entity}}. Use previous configuration?
step1.currency_mismatch_warning: This statement mixes several currencies in the same amount column; values will be summed as-is, with no conversion. Please review before confirming.

step2.title: Map file columns
step2.subtitle: Tell us which column in the file corresponds to each field.
step2.state_column_help: If the statement marks each transaction as completed/pending/reverted (e.g. Revolut), select that column here: non-final transactions (pending, reverted, declined...) will be skipped on import.
step2.detected_help: We've identified the columns for you. Review the preview and continue.

step3.title: Preview
step3.subtitle: Review detected transactions before confirming.
step3.dup_review_help: These transactions match in date, amount and description within the same statement. Tell us whether they are distinct transactions (import all) or duplicates (import just one).
step3.dup_blocked: Review the {{count}} duplicate transactions before importing
step3.trimmed_by_plan: {{imported}} transactions were imported. {{trimmed}} from this month were not imported due to your plan's limit ({{limit}}/month).

step4.title: Account opening balance
step4.why_title: Why are we asking for this?
step4.why_body: This statement doesn't include a balance column. To show your account balance and its history we need a starting point. Enter the current balance just once: we'll compute the balance for every transaction in this statement and in future ones automatically.
step4.date_help: Defaults to today. Change it if the balance is as of the statement's export date.
step4.date_warning: The date is earlier than the latest transaction in the statement. Please check it.
step4.required_hint: Enter the current balance to finish the import.

errors.parse_error: Error reading the file. Please check the format.
errors.no_rows: The file contains no data rows.
